LAW AND MOTION 302, NON-PARTY LABOR COMMISSIONER'S MOTION TO VACATE CLERK'S JUDGMENT ENTERED ON MARCH 9, 2016 IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND GOOD CAUSE SHOWN. MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: LAURA A. REDING, CSR 	711 =302/HK

calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Apr-11-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Non-party Labor Commissioner's motion to vacate clerk's judgment entered on March 9, 2016 is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. Moving party to prepare form of order. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Laura A. Reding, CSR 711 =302/hk
